description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurti from myntra. Made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsPink kurti with weave design, round neck, patch in front with short self placket and fabric buttons, sleeveless, insert pocket on the right and vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
